segments.text: Even today my complaint is bitter; My hand is listless because of my groaning.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Oh, that I knew where I might find Him, That I might come to His seat!
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: I would present my case before Him, And fill my mouth with arguments.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: I would know the words which He would answer me, And understand what He would say to me.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Would He contend with me in His great power? No! But He would take note of me.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: There the upright could reason with Him, And I would be delivered forever from my Judge.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Look, I go forward, but He is not there, And backward, but I cannot perceive Him;
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: When He works on the left hand, I cannot behold Him; When He turns to the right hand, I cannot see Him.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: But He knows the way that I take; When He has tested me, I shall come forth as gold.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: My foot has held fast to His steps; I have kept His way and not turned aside.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: I have not departed from the commandment of His lips; I have treasured the words of His mouth More than my necessary food.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: But He is unique, and who can make Him change? And whatever His soul desires, that He does.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: For He performs what is appointed for me, And many such things are with Him.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Therefore I am terrified at His presence; When I consider this, I am afraid of Him.
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: For God made my heart weak, And the Almighty terrifies me;
segments.speaker: Job

segments.text: Because I was not cut off from the presence of darkness, And He did not hide deep darkness from my face.
segments.speaker: Job
